summary: Completed testing of Calibration Clear-All, Notifications, and References features. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ DELETE /api/ai/calibration/clear-all - endpoint works correctly, returns deleted_count
✓ POST /api/ai/calibration/log - registers samples with id field
✓ GET /api/notifications/{user_pin} - returns notifications with unread count
✓ Admin Calibracao tab - 'Zerar Tudo' and 'Atualizar' buttons visible and functional
✓ NotificationPanel - opens on bell click, shows notifications with references
✓ Result screen - TACO/USDA/OpenFoodFacts references visible with data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Test samples created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features validated: Calibration clear-all, notifications with references, and result screen references. Premium user pin=1234 exists and has notifications.

DELETE /api/ai/calibration/clear-all.details: Endpoint exists, returns ok=true and deleted_count

POST /api/ai/calibration/log.details: Registers correct and incorrect samples with id field

DELETE /api/ai/calibration/{sample_id}.details: Deletes samples by ID, returns ok=false for non-existent

POST /api/notifications/generate.details: Generates notification with title, message, and references array

GET /api/notifications/{user_pin}.details: Returns notifications array and unread count

POST /api/notifications/{user_pin}/read.details: Marks notification as read by date

Admin Calibracao tab.details: 'Zerar Tudo' (red) and 'Atualizar' (blue) buttons visible, thresholds displayed (90%/50%/<50%)

NotificationPanel.details: Opens on bell click, shows 'Gerar Notificacao do Dia' button, displays notifications with expandable references

Result screen references.details: TACO, USDA, OpenFoodFacts links present with data-testid attributes (ref-taco, ref-usda, ref-off)
